title: senecio sweetii
intro: Senecio sweetii, also known as the sweet wormwood or sweet absinthe, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio sweetii include its ability to treat fever, malaria, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve mental clarity. Herbal preparations of Senecio sweetii can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
